# External Skills Reference

This directory is kept as a local reference archive while the active repository contract moves into `.claude/skills/`.

## Status

- `external_skills/` is `reference-only`
- it is not part of the active repository contract
- it should not be treated as the authoritative source for current workflow behavior

## Active Sources Of Truth

- active skills: `.claude/skills/`
- result contract: `workflow/contracts/result-workspace-contract.yaml`
- workflow guidance: `README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `/opsx:*` command docs

Use this directory only when extracting reusable ideas or examples into the active skill stack.
